property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Player\bin\;C:\ProgramData\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Windows\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;E:\Programas\Git\cmd;E:\Programas\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;%M2_HOME$\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;E:\Programas\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.3.1.1\bin;;E:\Programas\PyCharm 2024.3.1.1\bin;;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1\bin;C:\Users\feli2\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;E:\Programas\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;;.

testcase.name: findAll_deberiaTraerLosConsumosSemilla
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[35m[Hibernate]&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mdrop&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mtable&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mif&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mexists&amp#27;[0m CONSUMOS &amp#27;[34mcascade&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[35m[Hibernate]&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mdrop&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mtable&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mif&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mexists&amp#27;[0m COTIZACIONES
